* **IMMZD18SVaricella2DosesLogic**

## Library: IMMZD18SVaricella2DosesLogic 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD18SVaricella2DosesLogic | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-03-25 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD18SVaricella2DosesLogic |

 
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Varicella.2-dose schedule table in the Immunization CPG
